explanations.7: This passes the Docker group ID from your host machine into the build process, defaulting to 1000 if the variable isn't set.
explanations.8: This passes the Docker user ID from your host machine into the build process, defaulting to 1000 if the variable isn't set.
explanations.10: This sets which user and group (by their numeric IDs) will run commands inside the container, using the same IDs passed in earlier.
explanations.13: This adds an extra group to the container's user so they can access resources owned by that group.
explanations.15: This is the numeric ID of the group being added, which defaults to 1001 if not specified in your environment.
